summary: Ported all 11 MCS completeness theorems from BimodalLogic to Cslib/Logics/Bimodal/Metalogic/Completeness.lean (478 lines). All sorry-free, verified with lean_verify and lake build. Theorems made generic over frame class (improvement over source). Variable S renamed to Omega to avoid scoped notation conflict.

artifacts.summary: MCS completeness properties: 6 propositional (disjunction/conjunction intro/elim/iff), 2 modal (box_closure, box_box), 3 diamond-box duality
